docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DECOTEAU, NICHOLE S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVEREST WATERPROOFING & RESTORATION INC. $6,737.58 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,887.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GAREEMA BAJGAIN (ADMINISTRATIVE MANAGER) FILED BY DEFENDANT EVEREST WATERPROOFING & RESTORATION INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY DECOTEAU, NICHOLE S EVEREST WATERPROOFING & RESTORATION INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM TJ SCOTT OKAMOTO. PLAINTIFF NICHOLE S DECOTEAU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EVEREST WATERPROOFING & RESTORATION INC. IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS GAREEMA BAJGAIN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SCOTT OKAMOTO; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,485.39 FILED BY DECOTEAU, NICHOLE S AS TO DEFENDANT EVEREST WATERPROOFING & RESTORATION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-23-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT EVEREST WATERPROOFING & RESTORATION INC.
